# SKILL: daily-stock-analysis

> LLM-Driven Multi-Market Stock Intelligent Analysis System

## Overview
daily_stock_analysis is an LLM-powered stock analysis system covering multiple markets (A-share, US, HK). It combines real-time quotes, news, financials, and technical indicators into intelligent decision dashboards with automated push notifications.

## Key Features
- **Multi-Market Coverage**: A-share (沪深), US stocks, HK stocks
- **LLM-Driven Analysis**: Uses LLM to synthesize data into actionable insights
- **Real-Time Data**: Multi-source quote aggregation with live updates
- **Decision Dashboard**: Visual dashboard showing buy/sell signals and risk levels
- **Automated Push**: Daily analysis reports pushed to email/Telegram/DingTalk
- **News Integration**: Real-time financial news correlation with stock movements

## Technical Details
- **Language**: Python
- **License**: MIT
- **Stars**: 50,298 (as of 2026-06-27)
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis
- **Install**: `pip install daily-stock-analysis`

## Quality Assessment
| Criterion | Score | Notes |

| Stars | 50.3K | Extremely popular in finance AI niche |
| Update Frequency | Active | Regular updates in 2026 |
| Documentation | Good | README + usage guides |
| Code Quality | Good | Python, well-structured |

## Grade: A
- 50K+ stars = proven popularity and community validation
- Finance AI is high-value niche with clear use cases
- Multi-market coverage (A-share + US + HK) matches Chinese investor needs
- Automated push aligns with our macro-data automation pattern

## Usage with WorkBuddy
```bash
# Install
pip install daily-stock-analysis

# Run daily analysis
python -m daily_stock_analysis --markets hs,us,hk

# Push to DingTalk
python -m daily_stock_analysis --push dingtalk
```
